abstracts.abstract: By Representative Moakley of Falmouth and Senator Cyr, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 4186) of Thomas W. Moakley (by vote of the town) relative to the affordable housing trust fund of the town of Edgartown.  Housing.  [Local Approval Received.]

bill.title: An Act relative to Affordable Housing Trust Fund of the town of Edgartown

action.description: Read second and ordered to a third reading
